name: BMW 330i
description: The 2025 BMW 330i is a luxury sports sedan that blends performance, comfort, and advanced technology. Powered by a turbocharged 255-horsepower engine, it delivers quick acceleration, precise handling, and excellent fuel efficiency. With its premium interior, cutting-edge infotainment system, and refined driving dynamics, the 330i remains one of the benchmark vehicles in the compact luxury sedan segment, competing with the Mercedes-Benz C-Class and Audi A4.
features:
BMW Curved Display with digital instrument cluster
BMW Operating System 8.5
Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
Navigation system
Dual-zone automatic climate control
LED headlights
Panoramic camera and parking assistance (available)
Adaptive cruise control (available)
Premium Harman Kardon sound system (available)

name: Toyota Sienna 2018
description: The 2018 Toyota Sienna is a reliable and spacious family minivan known for its powerful V6 engine, comfortable ride, and exceptional passenger capacity. It offers ample cargo space, strong durability, and low maintenance costs, making it a popular choice for large families, business transportation, and long-distance travel. Unlike most competitors, it was one of the few minivans available with all-wheel drive.
features:
Power sliding doors
Tri-zone automatic climate control
Rearview camera
Apple CarPlay not available from factory
Advanced safety features on higher trims

name: Mercedes-Benz GLE 450
description: The Mercedes-Benz GLE 450 is a premium luxury SUV that combines powerful performance, advanced technology, and exceptional comfort. It features a turbocharged 3.0-liter six-cylinder engine with mild-hybrid assistance, a luxurious interior, intelligent all-wheel drive, and cutting-edge safety features, making it ideal for both family use and executive transportation. Its blend of elegance, reliability, and prestige has made it one of the most sought-after luxury SUVs worldwide.
features: Engine: 3.0L turbocharged inline-6 with 48V mild-hybrid system
Fuel Economy: About 21 mpg combined (19 city / 25 highway)

name: Jetour T2+
description:
The Jetour T2 2025 is a boxy, off-road styled mid-size SUV from Jetour (a sub-brand of Chery), built to compete with lifestyle 4x4s like the Toyota Land Cruiser Prado and Land Rover Defender in design and capability positioning, but at a lower price point.

It is designed for buyers who want rugged looks + modern tech + off-road ability + strong value for money in one package.
features:
Large digital infotainment screen (high-resolution touchscreen)
Full digital instrument cluster
Advanced driver assistance (ADAS Level 2 features in some trims)
360° camera system
Wireless smartphone connectivity (Apple CarPlay / Android Auto depending on spec)
Premium-style interior design with leather options in higher trims

name: Dongefeng Mage 2025
description: The Dongfeng Mage 2025 is a modern Chinese compact SUV built to compete in the budget-to-mid range crossover market, focusing on strong design, high tech features, and efficient turbo performance at a lower price than European and Japanese rivals.
features:
10.25" digital instrument cluster
13.2" central touchscreen infotainment
Wireless charging + smartphone connectivity
Panoramic sunroof (~1.08 m² in some trims)
Leather seats (higher trims)
540° camera system (top trims)
Adaptive cruise control
Lane keep assist + lane departure warning
Blind spot monitoring
Automatic emergency braking
Stability control + hill descent assist

name: Cadillac XT4
description: Cadillac XT4 is a stylish compact luxury SUV that offers a premium driving experience with modern technology, a refined interior, and confident performance. Designed for comfort and versatility, it features advanced safety systems, spacious seating, and a sleek exterior, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking luxury, practicality, and everyday convenience.
features: ✔ Spacious cargo area for its class

name: Mercedes-Benz Maybach GLS
description: The 2025 Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 is the top-tier ultra-luxury version of the Mercedes GLS, designed for clients who want chauffeur-level comfort, extreme luxury, and flagship status in an SUV form. It sits above the regular GLS and competes with the Bentley Bentayga and Rolls-Royce Cullinan.
features:
ventilated seats
Optional 4-seat configuration (rear captain chairs + center console)
Premium Nappa leather everywhere (dashboard

seats)
Dual 12.3-inch MBUX screens + rear entertainment screens
Optional:
Champagne fridge
Fold-out tables
Rear luxury console
Burmester 3D surround sound system
Ambient lighting with multiple luxury themes

👉 This car is built more for back-seat experience than driving.
Length: ~5.2 meters
Wheelbase: extended for rear comfort
Weight: ~2.7 tons
Huge road presence with chrome-heavy Maybach grille and two-tone paint options
E-Active Body Control suspension
Road-scanning suspension system
Ultra-quiet cabin with heavy insulation
Dedicated “Maybach driving mode” for smoothness
Designed to feel like a rolling private jet cabin

name: Mercedes- Benz GLE350
description: The Mercedes-Benz GLE 350 is a premium midsize luxury SUV that combines elegant styling, advanced technology, and everyday practicality. Powered by a turbocharged 255-horsepower engine, it delivers a smooth and comfortable ride while offering a spacious cabin, cutting-edge safety systems, and the premium refinement expected from Mercedes-Benz. It is one of the most popular luxury SUVs for families, executives, and business owners seeking comfort, prestige, and versatility.
features:
Dual 12.3-inch digital displays
Latest MBUX infotainment system
Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
Voice control ("Hey Mercedes")
Ambient interior lighting
Power-adjustable heated front seats
Panoramic sunroof (available)
Burmester premium sound system (available)
